hooks.statusMessage: 세션 초기화 중 (AGENTS.md · progress · exec-plan 확인)...

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(/protocol-.*\.txt/.test(p)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'\u26a0\ufe0f LOOP A REQUIRED: Protocol file modified. Load docs/references/loop-a-verification-agent.txt and run all 4 checks before Stage B. Do not write the handoff file until OVERALL VERDICT: PASS.'}}))}});" 2>/dev/null || true

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const p=(j.tool_input||{}).file_path||'';if(/loop-b-handoff-.*\.md/.test(p)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'\ud83d\udd0d LOOP B REQUIRED: Handoff file detected. Load docs/references/loop-b-verification-agent.txt and run /code-reviewer to verify code integrity before issuing PASS/FAIL.'}}))}});" 2>/dev/null || true
